plain_english_summary: Deterministic speech-prosody encoding lane with public proof artifacts and lane verdict FAIL.
commercial_wedge: For speech-technology and voice-analytics teams evaluating deterministic, reproducible encoding of prosodic features. Business value is auditability and reproducibility in speech analysis; commercial readiness remains blocked by retrieval performance.
technical_wedge: Deterministic prosody compression via delta + zigzag + varint + RLE + zlib pipeline applied to speech-prosody signals. PRO-C001 through PRO-C004 PASS, PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL, PRO-C006 FAIL. Retrieval closure below threshold.
ideal_first_buyer: Speech-technology or voice-analytics infrastructure team needing deterministic prosodic signal encoding while accepting the current retrieval blocker.
deployment_model: Python package (`pip install zpe-prosody`) or source install (`pip install -e '.[dev]'`). FastAPI wrapper available via .[api] extra.
proof_anchors: PRO-C001 PASS: core codec round-trip fidelity
PRO-C003 PASS: prosodic feature extraction fidelity
PRO-C004 PASS: unit test and integration coverage
not_claimed: PRO-C005 PAUSED_EXTERNAL — blocked on external dependency
PRO-C006 FAIL — retrieval closure below threshold
family_position: Independent ZPE Prosody lane for speech-prosody signal domains. Lane verdict FAIL because retrieval closure is below threshold.
